prompt: Create a vertical high-fashion fine-art portrait of a young East Asian woman seated in a dark studio, turned three-quarters away but looking back toward the camera with a calm, melancholic expression. She has short glossy black bob hair with straight bangs, pale luminous skin, subtle red lips, and delicate makeup. Dress her in an off-shoulder black kimono-inspired gown with translucent lace sleeves embroidered with pale beige cherry blossoms, exposing one shoulder and upper back, with the fabric flowing downward into deep shadow. The composition is moody and centered slightly low, with her face in the lower middle-left area and her body forming an elegant curved silhouette. Behind her, place exactly 3 large black folding fans: one open fan radiating upward behind her head and right shoulder, one darker fan near the lower left behind her skirt, and one partially hidden fan on the right side. Add exactly 4 visible clusters of pale blossoms: one large cluster at the top center inside the circular halo, one medium cluster just above her shoulder, one small cluster to her right near the fan, and one cluster embroidered on the lower sleeve. Use a nearly black background with a large imperfect gold crescent-ring halo behind the upper body, broken metallic leaf texture, charcoal gray torn-paper patches, faint botanical line drawings, wisps of gold filigree, and sparse dust-like speckles. Lighting should be low-key and cinematic, with soft directional illumination on her face, shoulder, and flowers, while the edges fall into rich black. Visual style: Japanese gothic elegance, dark floral editorial photography, painterly mixed-media collage, luxurious black-and-gold palette, muted beige flowers, ultra-detailed fabric texture, shallow depth, dramatic negative space, no text, no watermark.
promptEn: Create a vertical high-fashion fine-art portrait of a young East Asian woman seated in a dark studio, turned three-quarters away but looking back toward the camera with a calm, melancholic expression. She has short glossy black bob hair with straight bangs, pale luminous skin, subtle red lips, and delicate makeup. Dress her in an off-shoulder black kimono-inspired gown with translucent lace sleeves embroidered with pale beige cherry blossoms, exposing one shoulder and upper back, with the fabric flowing downward into deep shadow. The composition is moody and centered slightly low, with her face in the lower middle-left area and her body forming an elegant curved silhouette. Behind her, place exactly 3 large black folding fans: one open fan radiating upward behind her head and right shoulder, one darker fan near the lower left behind her skirt, and one partially hidden fan on the right side. Add exactly 4 visible clusters of pale blossoms: one large cluster at the top center inside the circular halo, one medium cluster just above her shoulder, one small cluster to her right near the fan, and one cluster embroidered on the lower sleeve. Use a nearly black background with a large imperfect gold crescent-ring halo behind the upper body, broken metallic leaf texture, charcoal gray torn-paper patches, faint botanical line drawings, wisps of gold filigree, and sparse dust-like speckles. Lighting should be low-key and cinematic, with soft directional illumination on her face, shoulder, and flowers, while the edges fall into rich black. Visual style: Japanese gothic elegance, dark floral editorial photography, painterly mixed-media collage, luxurious black-and-gold palette, muted beige flowers, ultra-detailed fabric texture, shallow depth, dramatic negative space, no text, no watermark.
promptZh: 创作一张竖构图的高级时尚艺术肖像，主角是 一位年轻的东亚女性，她坐在昏暗的摄影棚中，身体侧转四分之三，但回眸看向镜头，神情平静而忧郁。她留着 黑色亮泽的短波波头，配有齐刘海，皮肤白皙透亮，涂着淡雅的红唇，妆容精致。为她穿上 一件露肩黑色和服风格长袍，袖子采用半透明蕾丝材质，绣有淡米色的樱花，露出单侧肩膀和上背部，布料向下垂落，融入深邃的阴影中。构图充满意境，重心略微偏低，她的脸部位于画面左下方，身体勾勒出优雅的曲线轮廓。在她身后放置 3 把黑色折扇：一把打开的扇子在她的头部和右肩后方向上放射，一把较暗的扇子在左下方裙摆后，另一把半掩的扇子在右侧。添加 4 簇清晰可见的淡色花朵：顶部中心圆形光环内一簇较大的花朵，肩膀上方一簇中等大小的花朵，右侧扇子附近一簇较小的花朵，以及袖口下部绣着的一簇花朵。背景近乎全黑，上半身背后有一个巨大的不规则金色新月环形光环，带有破碎的金属箔纹理、炭灰色撕纸补丁、淡淡的植物线条画、金丝细纹以及稀疏的尘埃状斑点。光影采用低调的电影感布光，柔和的定向光照亮她的脸部、肩膀和花朵，边缘则隐入浓郁的黑色中。视觉风格：日式哥特优雅、深色花卉编辑摄影、绘画感混合媒介拼贴、奢华的黑金配色、柔和的米色花朵、超细腻的布料质感、浅景深、富有戏剧性的负空间，无文字，无水印。
